headline: Sarawak Land Code Amendment Sparks Indigenous Protests
context: Proposed amendment to Sarawak Land Code would allow compulsory NCR acquisition for infrastructure with only 90 days notice.

cards.big: Land code amendment allows compulsory NCR acquisition with 90 days notice
cards.sub: Indigenous groups say change strips centuries of customary land protections

cards.big: 3,500 indigenous people protested at Kuching DUN building March 1 2026
cards.sub: Largest indigenous rights demonstration since anti-Bakun protests of 1999

cards.big: Amendment affects estimated 1.8 million hectares of claimed NCR territory
cards.sub: Compensation rates set at 2020 market value which groups say is inadequate

cards.big: GPS backbenchers initially supported but 12 reversed position after protests
cards.sub: Premier agreed to pause second reading pending community leader consultation

cards.big: Mass protest tests whether indigenous land rights can resist legislative pressure
Land Code amendments spark protests because indigenous land governance predates and should constrain state power.
